mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >65% of periods when FEDFUNDS declines, or rolling Rank IC < 0.02 over 3 years.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in >70% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power when UNRATE growth exceeds 1.0pp.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real sales of automobiles and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand recovery, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive momentum in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns in >60% of cases, or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production index values reflect strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which translates to higher corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth fails to predict positive 20-day returns during early-cycle phases, or the relationship reverses when capacity utilization exceeds 85%.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls sustains household income and consumption expenditures, supporting equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth correlates negatively with 20-day forward returns in >55% of observations, or rolling IC drops below 0.01 across all macro regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating monthly inflation erodes real corporate margins and triggers expectations of tighter monetary policy, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: High inflation months are followed by positive 5-day returns in >65% of cases, or the threshold effect vanishes when CPIAUCSL exceeds 250.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between quarterly GDP growth and monthly auto sales signals structural demand weakness, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The GDP-auto sales divergence metric shows no predictive power for 20-day returns, or the interaction term yields a positive coefficient instead of negative.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a recessionary phase reflects severe output contraction, but equity markets price in the trough early, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days as recovery expectations build.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during recessionary troughs are followed by negative 60-day returns in >70% of cases, or the signal fails to outperform a buy-and-hold baseline.
